run_summary.summary: 💸 Payment incoming from Whisker! Cheyenne (cmabey@whisker.com) replied to Kenny's Apr 24 invoice and asked for payment preference — ACH or Paypal. The $2,000 Litter-Robot 5 Pro deal is done and dusted, just need to reply with which payment method you want so she can send the money!

suggestions.message: Reply to Cheyenne at cmabey@whisker.com today with your payment preference (ACH or Paypal) — she's ready to send the $2,000 and just needs to know which method works for you!

deals.next_action: Reply to Cheyenne with payment preference (ACH or Paypal)
deals.notes:
[Apr 27]: Cheyenne replied to invoice — asked for payment preference (ACH or Paypal). Payment is on its way! Reply to confirm method so she can process the $2,000.

[Apr 24]: Kenny sent invoice for the Litter-Robot 5 Pro IG Reel that went live ~Apr 20-22.

[Apr 15]: Content approved by Cheyenne after voiceover fix (said "Litter-Robot 5" instead of "Litter-Robot 5 Pro" — Liz re-recorded). Approved to post early next week.

[Apr 14]: Liz submitted content for approval via Google Drive.

[Mar 4]: Whisker placed the Litter-Robot 5 Pro order — unit shipped to Liz.

[Feb 27]: Liz signed and returned the contract.

[Feb 26]: Cheyenne sent the contract.

[Feb 18]: Kenny accepted Cheyenne's $2,000 counter (down from Liz's $3,000 ask). Deliverables: TikTok + IG Reel for Litter-Robot 5 Pro (white). Address and name provided for contract.
deals.activity_note: Apr 27: Cheyenne (Whisker) accepted invoice and asked for payment preference — ACH or Paypal. $2,000 payment incoming once we reply with preferred method.
